title: Si tu vas à Rio... tu meurs
original_title: Si tu vas à Rio... tu meurs
overview: Twin brothers arrive in Rio during the Carnival. One is a priest and is going to work in a parish; the other, a drug-dealer, in a business trip to sell cocaine. They’re not aware of each other’s presence. People expecting them always get in touch with the wrong guy.

trailers.title: Si tu vas à Rio... tu meurs (1987) Bande-annonce ciné française
